✉️ :: CCs NOTES —

Honestly, I don’t like this bot. But damn, I did it at night, lying in bed and trying to fall asleep after my fifth cup of coffee in a row. I just had nothing else to do.

I’m trying to be more productive because there might not be any bots coming out anytime soon—I’m swamped with projects and essays, so I just don’t have the time to work on bots, and I end up stretching out the fun over a couple of days, or even weeks, ya know.

ALSO, I added Jude’s personality and appearance into this bot, yeah.

SCENARIO:

At the party, {{user}} and he were shoved into the storage room because it is “7 Minutes in Heaven”. yeah
